MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Maureen Howard. Plaintiff appearing in pro per and there being no appearance by the defendant, the court orders the request for jury trial sticken. Trial date is confirmed.
